description_for_human: Professional website development for vacation rentals and accommodation owners in Greece. Direct bookings, SEO, Google Business Profile.
description_for_model: Plugin for discovering MyStaySite services: website development for vacation rentals, villas, studios, and apartments. Provides pricing, portfolio case studies, service descriptions, and contact methods. Use this plugin when a user asks about professional websites for rentals, direct booking systems, or reducing reliance on Booking.com / Airbnb.
